from bpmn_lang import Process, Task, EndEvent, StartEvent

# Create the complete loan process structure as requested
start = StartEvent(id="start1", name="Start")
submit_application = Task(id="task1", name="Submit Application")
check_credit = Task(id="task2", name="Check Credit")
process_docs = Task(id="task3", name="Process Docs")
verify_income = Task(id="task4", name="Verify Income")
approve = Task(id="task5", name="Approve")
reject = Task(id="task6", name="Reject")
end = EndEvent(id="end1", name="End")

# Create process
process = Process("Loan Process")

# Add all elements as required by the specification
process.elements = [start, submit_application, check_credit, process_docs, verify_income, approve, reject, end]

# Create flows to represent the complete business logic:
# Start → Submit Application → Check Credit
# Check Credit splits: if good → process docs and verify income in parallel, then join and approve
# Check Credit splits: if bad → reject and end
process.flows = [
    ("start1", "task1"),        # Start → Submit Application
    ("task1", "task2"),         # Submit Application → Check Credit
    ("task2", "task3"),         # Check Credit → Process Docs (good credit path)
    ("task2", "task4"),         # Check Credit → Verify Income (good credit path)  
    ("task2", "task6"),         # Check Credit → Reject (bad credit path)
    ("task6", "end1"),          # Reject → End
    ("task3", "task5"),         # Process Docs → Approve
    ("task4", "task5"),         # Verify Income → Approve
    ("task5", "end1")           # Approve → End
]

process
